name: Caribou Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Caribou steak or boneless stewing meat (cut into 1/2 inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound stew meat to tenderize. Good quality steaks will not need this.
2. Dredge the meat in 1/4 cup flour and salt.
3. Saute garlic, onions, and mushrooms in fat for 5 minutes. Remove them; add meat and brown.
4. Remove meat from pan.
5. Add remaining flour to drippings in the pan. Add Worcestershire sauce and bouillon dissolved in hot water.
6. Cook until thickened. Add sour cream. Heat until gravy just barely simmers.
7. Add the cooked meat and vegetables and heat.
8. Serve over rice or noodles. Sprinkle with paprika to accent.
